mapper.sql: id AS ticket_id, application_id, ticket_no, review_status, assigned_to, trigger_reason, risk_summary, review_comment, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO manual_review_ticket (application_id, ticket_no, review_status, assigned_to, trigger_reason, risk_summary, review_comment, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{ticketNo}, #{reviewStatus}, #{assignedTo}, #{triggerReason}, #{riskSummary}, #{reviewComment}, #{reviewedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM manual_review_ticket WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM manual_review_ticket WHERE review_status='PENDING' ORDER BY created_at, id
